post.summary: Admin dashboard login (email + password)
Pharmacy dashboard login (email + password)
Customer login: exchange a Firebase phone-auth ID token for API JWTs
Rider login: same Firebase phone OTP, but only pre-registered riders
DEV ONLY: mint a customer/rider token by phone (requires DEV_LOGIN_ENABLED=true)
Exchange a refresh token for a new token pair

get.summary: Decode the current bearer token (sanity check for clients)
Active delivery zones with per-zone fee/min-order/COD-cap config
Current customer profile with saved addresses

put.summary: Register this device for push notifications (customer or rider token)

post.summary: Add a delivery address (must carry a zoneId from GET /v1/zones)

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search text (min 2 chars); omit to list

parameters.name: zoneId
parameters.description: Restrict to in-stock items in this delivery zone

get.summary: List/search medicines (fuzzy: tolerates misspellings like "dollo"). Pass zoneId to only see what is in stock nearby, with the cheapest in-zone price.
Medicine detail; with zoneId includes which in-zone shops stock it
Master catalog list (includes inactive)

post.summary: Add a medicine to the master catalog
Bulk import/upsert medicines from CSV (matched by name). Bad rows are reported, not fatal.

get.summary: Active shops (optionally filtered to a zone)
Public shop details
My shop inventory (staff)

post.summary: Add a catalog medicine to my inventory (price must be ≤ MRP)

put.summary: Update price / stock flag for one medicine

get.summary: All shops incl. pending/suspended

post.summary: Onboard a shop (created PENDING until license is verified)

get.summary: Shop detail with staff and inventory

post.summary: Create a pharmacy-portal login for a shop
Ops-assisted: add/update inventory on a shop’s behalf

get.summary: All riders (for manual assignment)

post.summary: Register a rider (logs in via phone OTP on the rider app)
Price a cart: per-item availability & prices, delivery fee, min-order and COD checks, Rx flags. Call before checkout.
Verify the Razorpay Checkout success signature and confirm the payment
Place an order. Server re-prices everything; Razorpay orders return checkout params and stay PENDING until the payment webhook confirms.

get.summary: My orders (latest first)
My order detail — includes the delivery code to hand to the rider

post.summary: Cancel my order (allowed until the shop packs it); prepaid amounts auto-refund

get.summary: Orders for my shop (unpaid online orders are hidden until payment lands)
Order detail for my shop

post.summary: Confirm availability item-by-item. Dropped items auto-refund; zero available items cancels the order.
Mark the order packed and ready for rider pickup

get.summary: Live orders board data
Full order detail incl. payments, refunds and audit trail

post.summary: Assign (or reassign) a rider to a packed order
Ops manual override (phone-confirmed acceptance, forced cancel, etc.). Obeys the state machine; refunds/COD side effects apply automatically.

get.summary: My rider profile: duty status, COD cash-in-hand and active task count

post.summary: Go on/off duty. Only on-duty riders are offered new tasks.
Push my live GPS fix (foreground service pings this while on duty)

get.summary: My active delivery tasks (assigned → out for delivery)

post.summary: Accept an offered task (first-accept-wins)
Picked the parcel up from the shop
Heading to the customer
Complete delivery — requires the 4-digit code from the customer app (COD: collects cash into your ledger)
Delivery failed (customer unreachable etc.) — prepaid orders auto-refund
Get a presigned PUT URL to upload a prescription (private bucket). Pass the returned fileKey in order creation.

get.summary: Short-lived signed URL to view a prescription image (scoped to the order parties)
Prescription verification queue

post.summary: Approve or reject a prescription (rejecting also rejects + refunds the order)
Verify a prescription for my shop’s order (registered pharmacists only)

info.title: MediLocal API
info.description: Hyperlocal medicine delivery platform API. The OpenAPI spec at /docs-json also feeds the Dart client generator for the Flutter apps.

idToken.description: Firebase ID token obtained after phone OTP verification in the app

zoneId.description: Delivery zone the address falls in (from GET /v1/zones)

csv.description: Raw CSV text. Header: name,brand,genericName,manufacturer,mrpInr,packSize,schedule,rxRequired. Upserts by name (case-insensitive).

priceInr.description: Selling price in INR — must be ≤ the medicine MRP
Selling price in INR — must be ≤ MRP

licenseNo.description: Drug license number — verify the paper copy before activating

shopId.description: Pin a specific shop; omit to let the platform pick the best-covering shop in the zone

razorpaySignature.description: Signature from the Razorpay Checkout success handler

addressId.description: One of my saved addresses (its zone decides fees & the serving shop)

shopId.description: Pin a shop; omit to let the platform pick (same rule as cart quote)

rxFileKeys.description: S3 file keys from POST /v1/prescriptions/upload-url — required when any item needs a prescription

accepted.description: false = shop does not have it → item is dropped and auto-refunded

items.description: A decision for every item on the order

note.description: Why ops is overriding — goes into the order audit trail

onDuty.description: true = go on duty (receive task offers), false = go off duty

otp.description: Handoff code the customer reads out from their app

reason.example: Customer not reachable at the address

approve.description: true = approve; false = reject the prescription AND the order

rejectionReason.description: Required when rejecting — shown to the customer
